pr.title: roachprod/cli: fix file descriptor leak in DownloadLatestRoachprod
pr.body:
In `DownloadLatestRoachprod`, the `defer f.Close()` was registered after
the `f.Chmod(0700)` call. If `Chmod` returned an error, the function
would return before the defer was registered, leaking the file
descriptor.

Move the defer immediately after the successful `os.Create` call so
the file is closed on all return paths.

Resolves: #164231
Epic: none

Release note: None
